meaning: n.小锚,石锚,<英俚>海军一等兵
examples: "Well, damn me if there are not a thousand places in the Thames more hazardous than this," Killick snorted.
Captain Killick aboard the leading transport Goodwill angrily pushed the pilot aside and went forward to the forecastle to guide the ship through himself.
He knew that Mr Killick was in a fragile state at the time.
The film stars Sienna Miller as Caitlin, the wife of Welsh poet Dylan Thomas, and Knightley as Vera Killick, his childhood sweetheart.
